config_stamp.methodology: Single-pass on-box live verify (NOT a benchmark): production-posture headless boot (dev_mode=False, signed manifests, mTLS CERT_REQUIRED, real data root) mirroring launcher main(); /ingest file-mode of the 92,152-byte staged UniFi article; /approve; one knowledge-grounded retrieval question; timings from the driver's perf_counter log. Repo main @ e3bb2ef. Full evidence: docs/handoffs/uc002-003-live-verify-evidence_2026-06-11.md (gitignored working artifact) + Vikunja #655.

results.shared_pipeline_build_note: cold recompile - the 2026-05-28 GPU driver update invalidated the 2026-05-22 ov_cache; warm-cache boot is the boot-time baseline elsewhere

not_measured: statistical spread (n=1 single live pass - functional verify, not a benchmark)
warm-ov_cache boot time under this driver (cache was invalidated; first warm boot will differ)
retrieval latency vs knowledge-bank size (bank held exactly 1 doc / 3 chunks)
paste-mode and URL-mode ingest (URL mode is structurally absent until Stage C)
